title: Logistic Coordinator (LC/ Shipment/ Central)
description:
Job Description:

  • Prepare, monitor, and verify all shipping documents from suppliers. Accurately send shipping instructions and a full set of documents to relevant parties in a timely manner. Ensure all documents are filed and maintained properly.
  • Arrange timely payments to suppliers and monitor receivables from customers. Proactively check on credit line requirements, facilitate their application, and escalate any potential issues to management.
  • Handle internal systems (e.g., SAP, NNFS) to record all transaction data. Accurately input monthly closing entries and provide shipping documents to the accounting department for proper profit and loss management.
  • Serve as the primary point of contact for timely communication with customers, suppliers, and shipping companies. Proactively remind all parties of deadlines and provide necessary documents in a strict and timely fashion, both verbally and in writing.
  • Assist the Operation Manager and Traders in contract negotiations, dispatch, and demurrage negotiations to ensure timely and effective settlements.

Requirement:

  • Minimum Diploma Holder with 1- 3 years’ experience in bulk shipment (preferred with base metals experience)
  • Strong knowledge of bulk shipment logistics, Incoterms (FOB, CFR, CIF, etc.), Letters of Credit, and the Uniform Customs and Practice for Documentary Credits (UCP 600) and Uniform Rules for Collections (URC 522).
  • Candidates with proficiency in Mandarin due to the need to liaise with Chinese speaking clients/counterparts.
  • Effective communication and interpersonal abilities.
  • The ability to work effectively both independently and as part of a team
  • A high degree of diligence and accuracy in accomplishing tasks, with a strong focus on thoroughness in all areas of work.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref70@trustrecruit.com.sg

Please include the following information:

  • Reason for leaving
  • Expected Salary

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
